text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: T.M. Opera O and I are visiting a shrine, when...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hear me, gods! Make my brilliance shine brighter
still! May my grace bring greater warmth unto
all...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
As it is so. Thus, on these shoulders, I bear the
weight of all aspirations. I, on the Overlord's
path...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Phew... Hopefully the gods will be in a better mood now.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes. You see, I have been so busy in my
overlordly duties serving the people that I haven't
had time to come visit them.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What can be troubling is if I offend the gods
once, they'll play foul tricks on my health to get
attention.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I cannot deliver my radiance to the world with this
shadow cast unto me! That is why...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Oh... This is the worst timing.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ah! Have you also come here to speak with me?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: No! I just... wanted to look at the stars.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Concealing your true aspirations in the face of my
majesty—how courageous!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
With my brilliance that shines brighter than any
star, I shall fulfill your precious little desire!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Wait, where are you going with this?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: FLASH!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Wh-what is that light?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: My ambition, of course!
choice_data_list: No, that's got to be the moon...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
There's no way... The moon could never be that
bright.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaaah ha ha ha! My splendor is supreme!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Is the light we're seeing from the moon, or could
it truly be T.M. Opera O's shining ambition?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whatever the case, the shadow cast over her has
been cleared! Her commanding radiance is
returned!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crack! Boom! Rumble...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Alas! The gods lament... It would seem they want
me all to themselves.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Fear not—I am the Overlord! It is my duty to
spread my affection equally!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
No matter if storm clouds brew... or my health
crumble!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hear me, gods! I shall cry out again, and still
more, until you finally understand!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Dark clouds continue to shadow T.M. Opera O's
radiance.
